questions.question:
Consider the following psuedocode:

x: integer := 1  
y: integer := 2   
procedure add  
    x:= x + y    
procedure second (P: Procedure)  
    x: integer := 2      
    p()   
procedure first  
    y: integer := 3
    second (add) 
first () 
write_integer(x)

What does it print if the language uses dynamic scoping with deep binding?



Compiler Design: ISRO
